description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Visual Studio Build that runs on push and pull request events. Use a Windows job matrix to build with different configurations of Visual Studio, including architectures x64, amd64_x86, amd64_arm64, generators Ninja, build types release and debug, and build options default, link_off, and translations_only. For each job, delete and then install specific Visual Studio components, check out the repository, prepare the Visual Studio environment, configure CMake, build, and run tests if applicable.
